title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个基于代理技能的框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: affaan-m/ECC 是一个针对 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等 AI 编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能代理项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察而生成的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为表现。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由AI代理管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust和Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: mattpocock/skills
content: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
summary: GitHub仓库mattpocock/skills，提供面向真实工程师的技能集合，内容直接来自作者的.agents目录。
highlights: Skills for Real Engineers
Straight from my .agents directory

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能使用和构建 AI，提供工具以使用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: A tour of MLIR: The Dialect Stack Everyone Depends On
summary: 本文介绍了MLIR的多层方言栈架构，强调其作为编译器基础设施如何通过分层抽象支持不同领域的优化，并指出这种设计已成为许多项目依赖的核心技术。
highlights: MLIR通过多层方言栈实现领域特定优化
该架构被广泛依赖，成为编译器生态的关键组件

title: Not just development, distribution of software may change as well
summary: 文章探讨了软件开发与分发模式的潜在变革，指出未来不仅开发方式会演进，软件的分发机制也可能发生根本性变化。
highlights: Not just development, distribution of software may change as well
未来软件分发机制可能发生根本性变化

title: Launching Health in ChatGPT
content: Health in ChatGPT now lets eligible U.S. users securely connect medical records and Apple Health to get more personalized insights and better understand their health.
summary: OpenAI宣布在美国推出ChatGPT健康功能，允许符合条件的用户安全连接医疗记录和Apple Health数据，以获得更个性化的健康洞察。
highlights: Health in ChatGPT now lets eligible U.S. users securely connect medical records and Apple Health
to get more personalized insights and better understand their health

title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
content: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.
summary: OpenAI宣布在佐治亚州埃芬汉县启动Project Camellia项目，承诺负责任能源、社区投资、就业机会及Codex访问权限。
highlights: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia
commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex

title: Bringing Nunchaku 4-bit Diffusion Inference to Diffusers
summary: 本文介绍了如何将Nunchaku的4位扩散推理集成到Diffusers库中，实现高效的模型推理。
highlights: Bringing Nunchaku 4-bit Diffusion Inference to Diffusers
实现高效的4位扩散模型推理

title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
summary: 本文概述了物理AI仿真的现状，探讨了仿真技术在训练和测试物理AI系统（如机器人、自动驾驶）中的作用、挑战与进展，并强调了高保真仿真环境的重要性。
highlights: 物理AI需要高保真仿真环境来有效训练和验证系统。
仿真技术面临现实与虚拟差距的挑战，但进展显著。
NVIDIA在推动物理AI仿真平台方面处于领先地位。
